steps.title: Connect the two texts
steps.content: Text 1 says microscopic or quantum laws suggest these thermodynamic processes should be reversible, even though macroscopic processes are not. Text 2 describes an experiment confirming irreversibility at the quantum level, while also noting that the cause was not pinpointed.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported readings
steps.content: A invents disagreement among researchers. C reverses the issue by saying the result fits microscopic theory, when the experiment challenges the predicted reversibility at that level. D raises a concern about generalizing laboratory findings that Text 1 never states. The experiment gives evidence that the microscopic account is incomplete. The answer is B.
